ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Aug-07-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Rosa Bugaria, specially appearing for Attorney Owili Eison of the law offices of Banafsheh Danesh & Javis PC (310-887-1818) appears by telephone as moving counsel seeking leave to withdraw as counsel for plaintiff, Winsome Marie West

No other appearance is made in this matter

Attorney Owili K. Eison's motion to be relieved as counsel of record for PLAINTIFF WIMSOME MARIE WEST is GRANTED. Withdrawing counsel shall submit a [proposed] written order in Judicial Council form. The [proposed] order shall include (a) effective upon filing of proof of service, (b) client's contact information, and (c) all future court dates in this action.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Gordon F. Aiavao, CSR No. 11216, email: gaiavao@sftc.org. (D302)
